content:
“很好，很好……深呼吸……”
“再多信賴我一點，聆聽我的指引。”

克萊門汀醫生手中的靈擺勻速晃動，暖爐裡柴薪劈啪作響，一陣深沉的睏意襲來…
用催眠來實現深度睡眠？還真是個治療失眠的新奇方法。

🍃 在克萊門汀引領下的夢境將何等美妙？守密人，用一個趣聞八卦來換取一次「酣眠療癒」如何~
🍃 在評論區留下你的「趣聞八卦」分享，克萊門汀將親自為留言的守密人送上「好夢」。

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

“Very good, very good...Take a deep breath—”
“Trust me a little more，Listen to my guidance...”

The Pendulum in Dr. Clementine's hand swayed at a constant speed, the firewood in the stove crackled, and a deep sleepiness came over me...
Using hypnosis to achieve deep sleep? It's really a novel way to treat insomnia.

🍃 How wonderful will the dream be under Clementine's guidance? keeper, how about exchanging an interesting gossip for a "sound sleep therapy"~
🍃  Leave your "interesting gossip" in the comment area, and Clementine will personally send "good dreams" to the keeper who left the message.
thread_title: 🔔克萊門汀的酣眠療愈┊Clementine's Sleep Therapy

content:
由塔薇杯主辦團隊、 <@694573382380945529>  分別主辦的相位對弈賽事：「塔薇杯」、「The PVP Tournament」已經圓滿落幕，感謝各位參賽者為我們帶來的精彩對決！

為了回饋大家對《忘卻前夜Morimens》的熱情與喜愛，本週內，我們將為賽事主辦人、「四強」選手發放「維度桂冠」頭像框！

未來我們也會在DC舉辦獎勵豐富的相位對弈友誼賽活動，各位敬請期待~

📣歡迎願意自發性組織賽事的守密人聯絡我們，我們會為大家提供例如公告宣傳、交流頻道創建之類的支援！
📣近期，多位熱心守密人舉辦了新一輪相位對弈賽事－“N廚杯”，歡迎大家積極報名參與，賽事詳情可戳  <@1326878892664815632> 了解~

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

The Traphase tournaments hosted by Tawil Cup Organizing Team  and <@694573382380945529>  respectively: "Tawil Cup" and "The PVP Tournament" have come to a successful conclusion. Thank you to all the participants for bringing us such a wonderful match!

In order to give back to everyone's enthusiasm and love for 《忘卻前夜Morimens》, this week,we will give the "Dimensional Laurel" avatar frame to the tournament organizers and the "top four" players!

In the future, we will also hold Traphase friendly tournaments with rich rewards in DC, so stay tuned~

📣Keepers who are willing to spontaneously organize tournaments are welcome to contact us. We will provide you with support such as announcements and communication channel creation!
📣Recently, Many enthusiastic  keepers held a new round of Traphase competition - "N C Cup". Welcome everyone to actively sign up and participate. For details of the competition, For more details of the event, please visit  <@1326878892664815632>
thread_title: 🏆相位對弈•玩家賽事頒獎！Traphase•Player Tournament Awards！
